P@SHA Startup Hub — About PSEC
(Source: https://startups.pasha.org.pk/about)
(Status: CURRENT — live page retrieved 2026-07-24)

Established 2026
Stewarded by PASHA
Updated daily
Overview The Hub
P@SHA Startup Hub is Pakistan’s digital home for startups. Developed through the joint efforts of the P@SHA Startups & Entrepreneurship Committee and the P@SHA Secretariat, it connects founders with opportunities, investors, incubators, accelerators, corporates, mentors, and the broader technology ecosystem.
Whether you are building your first startup or scaling an established venture, the Hub helps you increase visibility, discover support programs, build meaningful connections, and access opportunities that accelerate growth.

P@SHA Startup Hub — About PSEC
(Source: https://startups.pasha.org.pk/about)
(Status: CURRENT — live page retrieved 2026-07-24)

Our mission is simple: to strengthen Pakistan’s startup ecosystem by making it easier for startups to be discovered, supported, and connected.
What you'll find 05 things
A verified directory of Pakistani startups.
Startup profiles showcasing products, founders, and achievements.
Access to ecosystem partners, including incubators, accelerators, investors, mentors, and service providers.
Community updates, events, and ecosystem opportunities.
A central platform that promotes collaboration across Pakistan’s innovation ecosystem.
The committee 14 members
Chair
Usman Akbar
CEO
PureLogics

Contact Committee Propose Collaboration
Mission Our Mission & Objectives

P@SHA Startup Hub — Committee
(Source: https://startups.pasha.org.pk/committee)
(Status: CURRENT — live page retrieved 2026-07-24)

Contact Committee Propose Collaboration
Mission Our Mission & Objectives
We exist to make Pakistan's startup ecosystem more discoverable, more connected, and more globally competitive. Our committee drives policy, curates the directory, supports women founders, and facilitates investment — all under the PASHA umbrella.
Every quarter we publish progress updates, verify new startups, and host programmes that directly serve founders and ecosystem stakeholders.
Policy Advocacy
Maintain the highest standards for startup verification and directory quality.
Startup Enablement

P@SHA Startup Hub — Committee

Promote Collaboration
Engage government to shape startup-friendly regulation and national programs.

P@SHA Startup Hub FAQ — How can I showcase my startup to Pakistan's tech ecosystem?
(Source: https://startups.pasha.org.pk/#faq)
(Status: CURRENT — live listing retrieved 2026-07-24)

Question: How can I showcase my startup to Pakistan's tech ecosystem?
Answer: Create a verified startup profile and get listed once, discovered everywhere — by investors, enterprise buyers, press, talent, and peers. PASHA's verification badge adds credibility to everything you share.

metadata.title: P@SHA Startup Hub FAQ — How can I showcase my startup to Pakistan's tech ecosystem?
metadata.question: How can I showcase my startup to Pakistan's tech ecosystem?

documents.text:
P@SHA Startup Hub FAQ — How do I connect with investors and funding opportunities?
(Source: https://startups.pasha.org.pk/#faq)
(Status: CURRENT — live listing retrieved 2026-07-24)

Question: How do I connect with investors and funding opportunities?
Answer: Investors browse the directory by sector, stage, city, and traction to build their pipeline, so a complete, verified profile puts you in front of them. Dedicated investor interest workflows are expanding as the platform grows.

metadata.title: P@SHA Startup Hub FAQ — How do I connect with investors and funding opportunities?
metadata.question: How do I connect with investors and funding opportunities?

documents.text:
P@SHA Startup Hub FAQ — How can I find mentors and industry experts?
(Source: https://startups.pasha.org.pk/#faq)
(Status: CURRENT — live listing retrieved 2026-07-24)

Question: How can I find mentors and industry experts?
Answer: The Hub connects you to PASHA's network of mentors and experienced operators, who contribute guidance, expertise, and opportunities through the Hub team and its programmes.

metadata.title: P@SHA Startup Hub FAQ — How can I find mentors and industry experts?
metadata.question: How can I find mentors and industry experts?

documents.text:
P@SHA Startup Hub FAQ — Where can I discover startup events, competitions, and programs?
(Source: https://startups.pasha.org.pk/#faq)
(Status: CURRENT — live listing retrieved 2026-07-24)

Question: Where can I discover startup events, competitions, and programs?
Answer: The Events section surfaces upcoming programmes, competitions, and community gatherings across the ecosystem — including PASHA's own initiatives — so you always know what's next.

metadata.title: P@SHA Startup Hub FAQ — Where can I discover startup events, competitions, and programs?
metadata.question: Where can I discover startup events, competitions, and programs?

documents.text:
P@SHA Startup Hub FAQ — How can I connect with incubators, accelerators, and innovation hubs?
(Source: https://startups.pasha.org.pk/#faq)
(Status: CURRENT — live listing retrieved 2026-07-24)

Question: How can I connect with incubators, accelerators, and innovation hubs?
Answer: The Hub is one trusted entry point into Pakistan's ecosystem, linking founders with incubators, accelerators, and innovation partners. Highlight your incubation history on your profile and find programmes suited to your stage.

metadata.title: P@SHA Startup Hub FAQ — How can I connect with incubators, accelerators, and innovation hubs?
metadata.question: How can I connect with incubators, accelerators, and innovation hubs?

documents.text:
P@SHA Startup Hub FAQ — How do I find potential customers and business partners?
(Source: https://startups.pasha.org.pk/#faq)
(Status: CURRENT — live listing retrieved 2026-07-24)

Question: How do I find potential customers and business partners?
Answer: Enterprises use the Hub to find vetted local vendors and pilot partners without a lengthy RFP. A strong profile makes your solution discoverable to companies looking for what you build.

metadata.title: P@SHA Startup Hub FAQ — How do I find potential customers and business partners?
metadata.question: How do I find potential customers and business partners?

documents.text:
P@SHA Startup Hub FAQ — How can I hire talent or join a startup team?
(Source: https://startups.pasha.org.pk/#faq)
(Status: CURRENT — live listing retrieved 2026-07-24)

Question: How can I hire talent or join a startup team?
Answer: Talent explores the Hub to see which startups are growing and hiring. Founders can signal they're hiring on their profile; jobseekers can discover startups by sector, stage, and momentum.

metadata.title: P@SHA Startup Hub FAQ — How can I hire talent or join a startup team?
metadata.question: How can I hire talent or join a startup team?

documents.text:
P@SHA Startup Hub FAQ — Where can I access startup resources, guides, and templates?
(Source: https://startups.pasha.org.pk/#faq)
(Status: CURRENT — live listing retrieved 2026-07-24)

Question: Where can I access startup resources, guides, and templates?
Answer: Through the Hub and PASHA's wider capacity-building work — career resources, salary surveys, and industry insights — you get the knowledge and tools to build and scale with confidence.

metadata.title: P@SHA Startup Hub FAQ — Where can I access startup resources, guides, and templates?
metadata.question: Where can I access startup resources, guides, and templates?

documents.text:
P@SHA Startup Hub FAQ — How can I increase my startup's visibility and credibility?
(Source: https://startups.pasha.org.pk/#faq)
(Status: CURRENT — live listing retrieved 2026-07-24)

Question: How can I increase my startup's visibility and credibility?
Answer: A complete profile plus PASHA's verification badge is your credibility signal. More complete profiles rank higher and become more discoverable to investors, buyers, and partners.

metadata.title: P@SHA Startup Hub FAQ — How can I increase my startup's visibility and credibility?
metadata.question: How can I increase my startup's visibility and credibility?

documents.text:
P@SHA Startup Hub FAQ — How do I become part of Pakistan's startup community?
(Source: https://startups.pasha.org.pk/#faq)
(Status: CURRENT — live listing retrieved 2026-07-24)

Question: How do I become part of Pakistan's startup community?
Answer: Join the Hub — create your account and build your profile to plug into Pakistan's national startup network: a 1600+ member ecosystem, events, mentors, and the people moving it forward.

metadata.title: P@SHA Startup Hub FAQ — How do I become part of Pakistan's startup community?
metadata.question: How do I become part of Pakistan's startup community?

documents.text:
P@SHA Startups & Entrepreneurship Committee
(Source: https://startups.pasha.org.pk/committee)
(Status: CURRENT — live listing retrieved 2026-07-24)

The P@SHA Startups & Entrepreneurship Committee has 14 members. It steers the P@SHA Startup Hub, its verification standards and its ecosystem partnerships.
Chair: Usman Akbar — CEO, PureLogics
Committee Member: Noman Hassan — CBO, Resourceinn
Committee Member: Talha Bin Afzal — CEO, Algoryte
Committee Member: Shawana Iftikhar — CEO, Work Generations
Committee Member: Asim Ishaq Khan — Director, LMKT
Committee Member: Muhammad Omer Khan — CEO, Bits Collision
Committee Member: Amna Masood — CEO, MavenLogix
Committee Member: Syed Rizwan Ali — Head of Business Incubation Center, Bahria University
Committee Member: Muhammad Irshad Kanwal — CEO, AllZone Technologies
Committee Member: Hamad Pervaiz — CEO, BearPlex
Committee Member: Muhammad Azeem Akram — CEO, AlphaSquad Technologies
Secretariat: Ali Hasani — Secretary General, P@sha
Committee Member: Zain Tariq — Manager Industry Engagement, P@sha
Committee Member: Muhammad Tayyab — Assistant Coordinator, P@sha
